note_text: Wound note - Rightplantar. Meas 1.4x1.7x0.7cm. Mod serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 40% gran, 60% slough. Periwound macerated. Collagen dsg changed. Pt tolerated well. Dr. Patel notified.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right plantar wound site, rates 8/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Diabetic diabetic Right plantar measures 1.4 cm x 1.7 cm x 0.7 cm.
  Wound bed: 48% slough, 52% granulation tissue. Periwound: indurated.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: none.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Right plantar — not improving.
Plan: Negative pressure wound therapy initiated. Offloading boot applied.
